name: Cajun Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayonnaise and mustard in a bowl large enough to hold the mixture but shaped so it can be beaten with a fork.
2. Beat the mayonnaise and mustard together until fully combined.
3. Slowly add olive oil while continuously beating until the mixture reaches the thickness of original mayonnaise.
4. Add Louisiana hot sauce, continuing to beat.
5. Incorporate ketchup and keep beating.
6. Stir in salt and garlic salt as you continue beating.
7. Mix in wine vinegar (this will thin the sauce), ensuring it is well combined with lemon juice added gradually.
8. Taste for salt and pepper adjustments.
9. Place shredded cabbage, sliced peppers, and shredded onions into a large salad bowl.
10. Pour the prepared sauce over the vegetables and toss well.
11. Allow the coleslaw to chill for about an hour before serving; it often tastes even better the next day.
